notes: Boss Key persistence fix. Bug: fresh installs got 0 keys instead of the 10 starter grant because the sentinel was checked against the wrong default. Fixed: var defaults to -1 (sentinel for 'never persisted yet'), starter grant fires once on first launch and saves immediately, subsequent launches read the real saved value. 10 starter keys, then must buy more in SHOP at 50 PULSE each (or earn from Boss Rush victories: S=+3, A=+2, B=+1). All stats currently saved LOCALLY — server-side stat sync is on the roadmap before public launch.
